name: Sandy's Lentil/Rice/Barley Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and sort lentils, rice, and barley.
2. Simmer lentils, rice, and barley in 6 cups water with salt, onion, bay leaf, and sweet basil until tender.
3. Add corn and evaporated milk.
4. Add additional salt to taste.
5. Warm to desired eating temperature.
Serve in a bowl with generous servings of Cottage Cheese on top of the soup.
